title: Seares
summary:
Seares may refer to:

Seares (Castropol), a parish in Castropol, Asturias, Spain
Seares (crater), a lunar impact crater located in the northern part of the Moon's far side
Frederick Hanley Seares (1873–1964), American astronomer
